CustomField.description: Field is used to trigger a Funding Disbursement flow (which will be triggered via separate flows that check this box) that will re-run all the formulas on any child objects and roll-up that data up into fields on this object. The flow will then uncheck this box again to allow for future re-triggering.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Field is used to trigger a Funding Disbursement flow (which will be triggered via separate flows that check this box) that will re-run all the formulas on any child objects and roll-up that data up into fields on this object. The flow will then uncheck this box again to allow for future re-triggering.
CustomField.label: Trigger Flow
